news.paragraph: Chevron is approaching an upcoming catalyst with its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 27, 2026, where certain groups are urging shareholders to vote against a specific proposal. Additionally, market participants are still processing analyst insights and questions stemming from the company's recent Q1 earnings call.
headlines: ADL and JLens Urge Chevron Shareholders to Vote AGAINST Proposal 6 at the Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 27, 2026
